packageRules.description: Group VictoriaMetrics + vmagent image bumps across docker-compose, helm/kubebolt, and helm/kubebolt-agent. vmagent tracks the VM release line (built from the same source tree, share Go stdlib CVEs) so the three pin sites must move in lockstep — the preflight-third-party-scan fails on drift.
Hold patch-only Go module bumps weekly to avoid PR noise.
Auto-merge non-major GitHub Action bumps after CI is green.

customManagers.description: Pick up the VictoriaMetrics tag in helm/kubebolt values.yaml (the file isn't a recognised Renovate manager template).
Pick up the vmagent tag in helm/kubebolt-agent values.yaml. Tolerant of comment lines between `repository:` and `tag:` (the values file documents the lockstep policy with prose).
